## What Changed

Describe the change and the exact workflow boundary it affects.

## Evidence

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Python compile check passes
- [ ] No credentials, live sessions, private structures, or workstation paths
- [ ] No `gmx mdrun`
- [ ] Production status remains conservative

## Failure And Recovery Behavior

State the failure mode, stop condition, recovery action, and any remaining
scientific or operational uncertainty.
